name: Stale success/error banners persist across reopen or field edits
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-13] change-password / FeedbackSheet / WithdrawalCountdownBanner keep stale banners until next submit/close. Fix: clear on reopen/edit.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: local banner state is cleared only on submit/close/success paths, not when the surface reopens or the user edits relevant fields, so stale success/error copy remains visible. Variants: ChangePassword success/error after field edits, FeedbackSheet submitted/error after reopen or message edit, and WithdrawalCountdownBanner restored success after the child list changes. Regression tests: extend apps/mobile/src/components/change-password.test.tsx, add/extend FeedbackSheet coverage, and extend apps/mobile/src/components/family/WithdrawalCountdownBanner.test.tsx for stale-banner clearing.
